field.name: ma_pc
field.check: ma_pc not in (select ma_pc from hrdmpc where kieu_pc = '1')

field.name: ma_nv
field.check: ma_nv not in (select ma_nv from hrnv)

field.name: ngay_hl_tu
field.check: ngay_hl_den is not null and ngay_hl_tu > ngay_hl_den

processing.text:
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @key nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32) declare @user int, @admin bit, @sys varchar(32), @joinUnit bit, @joinDept bit, @r int select @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID, @sys = '@@sysDatabaseName', @key = '', @joinUnit = 0, @joinDept = 0
-- Checking &Checking;
-- Key if @admin = 0 begin exec FastBusiness$HRM$DeptRightFilter @user, @admin, 'e', 'e', @sys, @key output, @joinUnit output, @joinDept output
if @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@admin, @user, 'hrAllowances', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end
select @key = dbo.FastBusiness$Function$System$GetCheckKey(@key) select @key = case when @key = '' then '' else ' where (' + @key + ')' end end
-- Gather select top 0 stt_rec, ma_pc, ngay_hl_tu, ngay_hl_den into #r from hrctpc select @q = 'insert into #r select e.stt_rec, a.ma_pc, a.ngay_hl_tu, a.ngay_hl_den' select @q = @q + ' from @@table a join hrnv e on a.ma_nv = e.ma_nv' + @key exec sp_executesql @q
-- Delete if @type = '0' delete #r from #r a where exists(select 1 from hrctpc b where a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.ma_pc = b.ma_pc and a.ngay_hl_tu = b.ngay_hl_tu) select a.stt_rec, a.ma_pc, a.ngay_hl_tu, a.ngay_hl_den into #k from #r a join hrctpc b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.ma_pc = b.ma_pc and a.ngay_hl_tu = b.ngay_hl_tu delete #r from #r a where exists(select 1 from #k b where a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.ma_pc = b.ma_pc and a.ngay_hl_tu = b.ngay_hl_tu)
-- Insert &Inserting;
-- Update if @type = '1' begin update hrctpc set @@list from hrctpc a join #k b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.ma_pc = b.ma_pc and a.ngay_hl_tu = b.ngay_hl_tu end
